entities.name: SEED SUPPLY SYSTEM
entities.description: A system ensuring the balance of seed demand and supply to provide farmers access to quality seeds at affordable costs.

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in the world or in a particular habitat or ecosystem, conserved through seeds.

entities.name: GLOBAL PLAN OF ACTION FOR THE CONSERVATION AND SUSTAINABLE UTILIZATION OF PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES FOR FOOD AND AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An international framework outlining activities for the conservation and sustainable use of plant genetic resources.

entities.name: INFORMAL SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farmer-led seed systems based on local resources and open-pollinated varieties, crucial for local food production.

entities.name: AGROBIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and variability of animals, plants and micro-organisms used directly or indirectly for food and agriculture.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: FORMAL HYBRID SEED INDUSTRY
entities.description: A private-sector led seed industry focusing on profit-making hybrid species and crops.

entities.name: SELF- OR OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties that are pollinated naturally, typically managed within informal seed systems.

entities.name: NATIONAL SEED POLICIES
entities.description: Government policies aimed at regulating and strengthening both formal and informal seed sectors.

entities.name: SEED VILLAGES
entities.description: A concept advocating self-sufficiency in the production and distribution of good quality seed at the village level.

entities.name: VILLAGE SEED BANKS
entities.description: Local repositories for storing and managing seeds to ensure community access and reduce dependence on external inputs.

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: A national organization in India coordinating agricultural research and education.

entities.name: NATIONAL RESEARCH CENTRE FOR SORGHUM
entities.description: A specialized research center focusing on the improvement and production of sorghum.

entities.name: STATE AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITIES
entities.description: Universities focused on agricultural education and research at the state level in India.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization working on agricultural research for drylands.

entities.name: ASIAN DEVELOPMENT BANK
entities.description: A regional development bank providing loans and technical assistance for development projects.

entities.name: TATA-ICRISAT PROJECT
entities.description: A collaborative project between Tata and ICRISAT implemented in specific districts of Madhya Pradesh.

entities.name: VIDISHA
entities.description: A district in Madhya Pradesh, India.

entities.name: GUNA
entities.description: A district in Madhya Pradesh, India.

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH RURAL LIVELIHOODS PROJECT
entities.description: A project aimed at improving rural livelihoods in the state of Andhra Pradesh.

entities.name: KURNOOL
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India.

entities.name: LOW-RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by minimal precipitation.

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRICULTURAL AREAS
entities.description: Regions where agriculture is practiced under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops grown for their edible seeds, providing food and fodder.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Pulse crops providing food, income, and fodder.

entities.name: CATTLE
entities.description: Domesticated bovine animals that utilize crop residues as fodder.

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed through breeding to increase production and meet farmer needs.

entities.name: SEED MULTIPLICATION AND DELIVERY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems for increasing seed quantity and distributing them to resource-poor farmers.

entities.name: ANANTAPUR
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India.

entities.name: MAHBUBNAGAR
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India.

entities.name: NALGONDA
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall.
